markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Finalize contract details for the new Ramp \<\> GrowthX project.](https://fathom.video/share/kDjcaVXAvoxQan18Q3cSz2xCPAiKbSu3?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Contract Approved:** The updated contract language for Phase 1 (site setup) was approved, clearing a major hurdle.](https://fathom.video/share/kDjcaVXAvoxQan18Q3cSz2xCPAiKbSu3?tab=summary&timestamp=105.0)
  - [**Domain & CMS:** GrowthX will cover standard domain costs and manage the CMS. Ramp will allow judicious cross-linking from the new site to Ramp.com to boost SEO.](https://fathom.video/share/kDjcaVXAvoxQan18Q3cSz2xCPAiKbSu3?tab=summary&timestamp=195.0)
  - [**Procurement Path:** The project now enters Ramp's procurement process, using Ironclad for legal redlines. The timeline is uncertain, pending vendor status confirmation.](https://fathom.video/share/kDjcaVXAvoxQan18Q3cSz2xCPAiKbSu3?tab=summary&timestamp=377.0)
  - [**POCs Assigned:** Tyler Pavlas (GrowthX) and Victoria (Ramp) are the primary points of contact for the contract negotiation.](https://fathom.video/share/kDjcaVXAvoxQan18Q3cSz2xCPAiKbSu3?tab=summary&timestamp=815.0)

## Topics

### Contract Review & Approval

  - [The updated contract language for Phase 1 deliverables (site setup, infrastructure, CMS) was reviewed and approved.](https://fathom.video/share/kDjcaVXAvoxQan18Q3cSz2xCPAiKbSu3?tab=summary&timestamp=105.0)

### Domain & CMS Logistics

  - [**Domain Cost:** GrowthX will cover the cost of a standard domain. Ramp will cover the cost of any premium, high-dollar domain they request.](https://fathom.video/share/kDjcaVXAvoxQan18Q3cSz2xCPAiKbSu3?tab=summary&timestamp=195.0)
  - [**Domain Selection:** Tyler will ask Marcel if a domain has already been selected. If not, GrowthX will recommend one before the contract is signed.](https://fathom.video/share/kDjcaVXAvoxQan18Q3cSz2xCPAiKbSu3?tab=summary&timestamp=229.0)
  - [**CMS Management:** Ramp prefers GrowthX to manage the CMS.](https://fathom.video/share/kDjcaVXAvoxQan18Q3cSz2xCPAiKbSu3?tab=summary&timestamp=275.0)

### Procurement & Negotiation Process

  - [**Vendor Status:** The timeline depends on GrowthX's status as a pre-approved vendor in Ramp's system.](https://fathom.video/share/kDjcaVXAvoxQan18Q3cSz2xCPAiKbSu3?tab=summary&timestamp=377.0)
      - [**Assumption:** GrowthX is an existing vendor, as a previous MSA was signed.](https://fathom.video/share/kDjcaVXAvoxQan18Q3cSz2xCPAiKbSu3?tab=summary&timestamp=430.0)
      - [**Action:** Victoria will confirm this status with George.](https://fathom.video/share/kDjcaVXAvoxQan18Q3cSz2xCPAiKbSu3?tab=summary&timestamp=522.0)
  - [**Negotiation Platform:** Legal redlines will be managed in Ironclad.](https://fathom.video/share/kDjcaVXAvoxQan18Q3cSz2xCPAiKbSu3?tab=summary&timestamp=551.0)
  - [**Contract Paper:** Ramp's legal team will decide whether to use GrowthX's or Ramp's contract template.](https://fathom.video/share/kDjcaVXAvoxQan18Q3cSz2xCPAiKbSu3?tab=summary&timestamp=570.0)
  - [**POCs:**](https://fathom.video/share/kDjcaVXAvoxQan18Q3cSz2xCPAiKbSu3?tab=summary&timestamp=815.0)
      - [**GrowthX:** Tyler Pavlas (working with Marcel)](https://fathom.video/share/kDjcaVXAvoxQan18Q3cSz2xCPAiKbSu3?tab=summary&timestamp=815.0)
      - [**Ramp:** Victoria (pending George's approval)](https://fathom.video/share/kDjcaVXAvoxQan18Q3cSz2xCPAiKbSu3?tab=summary&timestamp=815.0)

### Project Scope & Strategy

  - [**Ramp.com Opportunities:** The deliverable to analyze opportunities on Ramp.com will remain in the contract.](https://fathom.video/share/kDjcaVXAvoxQan18Q3cSz2xCPAiKbSu3?tab=summary&timestamp=623.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Keeps the option open for future strategy work, even though there are no immediate plans.](https://fathom.video/share/kDjcaVXAvoxQan18Q3cSz2xCPAiKbSu3?tab=summary&timestamp=664.0)
  - [**Cross-Linking:** Ramp approved cross-linking from the new site to Ramp.com.](https://fathom.video/share/kDjcaVXAvoxQan18Q3cSz2xCPAiKbSu3?tab=summary&timestamp=724.0)
      - [**Condition:** Links must be used judiciously to avoid triggering spam flags on either domain.](https://fathom.video/share/kDjcaVXAvoxQan18Q3cSz2xCPAiKbSu3?tab=summary&timestamp=724.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Tyler:** Confirm domain status with Marcel; recommend a domain if none is selected.](https://fathom.video/share/kDjcaVXAvoxQan18Q3cSz2xCPAiKbSu3?tab=summary&timestamp=870.0)
  - [**Mara/Tyler:** Send the final contract draft to Ramp by EOD today.](https://fathom.video/share/kDjcaVXAvoxQan18Q3cSz2xCPAiKbSu3?tab=summary&timestamp=868.0)
  - [**Ramp Team:**](https://fathom.video/share/kDjcaVXAvoxQan18Q3cSz2xCPAiKbSu3?tab=summary&timestamp=362.0)
      - [Review the final contract with George.](https://fathom.video/share/kDjcaVXAvoxQan18Q3cSz2xCPAiKbSu3?tab=summary&timestamp=362.0)
      - [Confirm GrowthX's vendor status in the procurement system.](https://fathom.video/share/kDjcaVXAvoxQan18Q3cSz2xCPAiKbSu3?tab=summary&timestamp=522.0)
      - [Designate Victoria as the contract negotiation POC.](https://fathom.video/share/kDjcaVXAvoxQan18Q3cSz2xCPAiKbSu3?tab=summary&timestamp=815.0)
